parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { bank_reference: $json.ref_code } }}

parameters.query:
WITH inserted_payment AS (
  INSERT INTO public.payments (phone, payment_reference, amount) 
  VALUES (
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}', 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.ref_code }}', 
    {{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.payment_amount }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (payment_reference) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
),
updated_user AS (
  INSERT INTO public.users (phone, first_name, last_name, balance)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}', 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.name }}', 
    '', 
    {{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.payment_amount }}
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_payment)
  ON CONFLICT (phone) 
  DO UPDATE SET balance = users.balance + EXCLUDED.balance, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  RETURNING qr_code_token, balance
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT qr_code_token FROM updated_user),
    (SELECT qr_code_token FROM public.users WHERE phone = '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}')
  ) AS qr_code_token,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT balance FROM updated_user),
    (SELECT balance FROM public.users WHERE phone = '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}')
  ) AS balance,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_payment) AS payment_inserted;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { from: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.to, to: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.from, type: 'text', text: { body: '❌ Hubo un problema al registrar tu pago: ' + $json.error_msg + '\n\nVerifica que la referencia no haya sido utilizada antes.' } } }}

={{ { from: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.to, to: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.from, type: 'image', image: { link: 'https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=300x300&data=RECARGA-' + Math.round($json.balance), caption: '¡Recarga Exitosa! 🎉

Se han abonado ' + $json.payment_amount + ' Bs a tu cuenta.
Tu saldo actual es de ' + $json.balance + ' Bs.

Presenta este código QR en el lector de la máquina para dispensar tu agua.' } } }}

={{ { from: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.to, to: $('Webhook (yCloud)').first().json.body.whatsappInboundMessage.from, type: 'image', image: { link: 'https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=300x300&data=RECARGA-' + Math.round($json.balance), caption: 'Hola ' + ($json.name || 'Cliente') + ', tu saldo actual es de ' + $json.balance + ' Bs.\n\nPresenta este código QR en el lector de la máquina para dispensar tu agua.' } } }}
={{ { bank_reference: $json.ref_code } }}

parameters.query:
WITH inserted_payment AS (
  INSERT INTO public.payments (phone, payment_reference, amount) 
  VALUES (
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}', 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.ref_code }}', 
    {{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.payment_amount }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (payment_reference) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
),
updated_user AS (
  INSERT INTO public.users (phone, first_name, last_name, balance)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}', 
    '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.name }}', 
    '', 
    {{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.payment_amount }}
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_payment)
  ON CONFLICT (phone) 
  DO UPDATE SET balance = users.balance + EXCLUDED.balance, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  RETURNING qr_code_token, balance
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT qr_code_token FROM updated_user),
    (SELECT qr_code_token FROM public.users WHERE phone = '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}')
  ) AS qr_code_token,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT balance FROM updated_user),
    (SELECT balance FROM public.users WHERE phone = '{{ $("Evaluar Pago Pabilo").first().json.phone }}')
  ) AS balance,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_payment) AS payment_inserted;
